unknown_call.message: Symbol is not in the source-backed Perception Enma API index.
unknown_call.repair: Run pcx api <intended-symbol> and replace the call with a documented API.

unsupported_symbol.message: Symbol matches a known LLM hallucination or wrong binding.
unsupported_symbol.repair: Use the repair message from knowledge/unsupported-symbols.json and verify the replacement with api_lookup.

wrong_routine_api.example:
void fn(int64 data) { ... }
int64 main() { register_routine(cast<int64>(fn), 0); return 1; }

routine_missing_cast.message: Routine function handles must be cast to int64.

invalid_routine_signature.message: Routine callbacks must accept one int64 data parameter.

argument_shape_mismatch.message: Argument has the wrong rough type shape.
argument_shape_mismatch.repair: Wrap raw coordinates/colors with the documented constructor.

argument_count_mismatch.message: Call arity does not match the source-backed signature.
argument_count_mismatch.repair: Use api_lookup to copy the exact documented parameter list.

missing_import.message: Symbol requires an Enma addon import.
missing_import.repair: Add the exact Enma import shown in the finding.

permission_required.message: API needs an explicit project/script permission or authorization note.
permission_required.repair: Declare the permission and handle permission-denied failure modes.

unchecked_failure_sentinel.message: API can return an ambiguous sentinel on failure.
unchecked_failure_sentinel.repair: Check existence/status/permission before trusting sentinel values.

wrong_context.message: API is being used outside its documented runtime context.
wrong_context.repair: Move the call into a registered routine/render context or choose a context-safe API.
